app.name: VIGIL APEX
regions.title: Regional findings map
regions.subtitle: Finding density weighted by severity, per administrative region
regions.empty_state: No findings recorded in the chosen window.
regions.click_hint: Click a region to filter the findings list.
auth.forbidden_body: Your account does not hold the role required for this page. If this is unexpected, contact the on-call operator.
auth.unauthenticated: Please sign in to access this page.
findings.title: Findings
findings.subtitle: Active findings produced by the Bayesian engine.
findings.empty: No findings match the current filter.
findings.detail.title: Finding {ref}
council.proposals.title: Council proposals
council.vote.touch_yubikey: Touch your YubiKey to sign the vote.
council.vote.duplicate: You have already voted on this proposal.
verify.title: Verify
verify.subtitle: Cross-check anchored dossiers in public.
verify.upload_match: The hash matches the official dossier.
verify.upload_mismatch: The hash does NOT match. The file differs from the official dossier.
ledger.title: Public ledger
dead_letter.title: Dead letter
calibration.title: Calibration
triage.title: Tip triage
tip.title: Secure tip
tip.subtitle: VIGIL APEX only sees the ciphertext. No log links the submission to your identity.
tip.notice_what_we_do: What we do: keep the ciphertext; decrypt it only after a 3-of-5 council quorum; turn it into a signed dossier if the allegation stands.
tip.notice_what_we_dont: What we do not do: log your IP, user-agent, or any metadata that could trace back to you.
tip.status.title: Status of tip {ref}
errors.404.title: Page not found
errors.404.body: The requested resource does not exist.
errors.500.title: Internal error
errors.500.body: The server hit a problem. Please try again.
